title: avenella flexuosa subsp. corsica
intro: Avenella flexuosa subsp. corsica, also known as Corsican bent, is a subspecies of Avenella flexuosa, a type of grass that grows in mountainous regions. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Avenella flexuosa subsp. corsica include relief from coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of certain infections. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
